title: App Settings - General - Account - Invite sent, user logs during the installation, not registered on Cloud
scenario: IT admin invite not accepted externally results in mobile user logged in without tenant association but invite still present under Account settings
steps: 1. As an IT admin, send an invite to a mobile user via an external source (e.g., laptop).
2. On the mobile device, install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. During onboarding, log in using the invited user's credentials.
5. Observe the Home screen and the user card.
6. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → Account → General/Account settings.
7. Check for the presence of Tenant ID and Tenant Name rows on the user card.
8. Check whether the invite to the tenant is still listed under General/Account settings.
expected: The user should be fully registered on the cloud with a tenant assigned. Tenant ID and Tenant Name rows should be present on the user card. The invite should no longer appear under General/Account settings after login.
